description: Returns the next VSC dc line in dc line name alphabetical order. The routine INIVSC must be called first. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, string = nxtvsc()

error_codes.description: No more VSC dc lines; ‘STRING’ unchanged.
‘STRING’ not long enough to contain entire dc line name; ‘STRING’ returned but contains a truncated dc line name.
